name: aem-copilot-assistant
description: GitHub Copilot slash commands for AEM 6.5 site development — scaffolds sites, templates, themes, components, and pages with step-by-step guidance.

commands.name: new-site
commands.description: Scaffold a new AEM 6.5 site — folder structure, .content.xml stubs, and setup steps. Usage: /new-site siteName=my-brand groupId=com.mybrand

commands.name: new-template
commands.description: Create an editable template under /conf/ with structure, policies, and initial nodes. Usage: /new-template name=content-page site=my-brand

commands.name: new-theme
commands.description: Scaffold a ClientLib folder with SCSS structure and wiring steps. Usage: /new-theme name=brand-theme site=my-brand components=nav,hero,footer

commands.name: new-page
commands.description: Generate a page .content.xml with jcr:content and parsys nodes. Usage: /new-page title=About site=my-brand template=content-page depth=standard

commands.name: new-component
commands.description: Generate a full AEM component — node, HTL, Sling model, and dialog. Usage: /new-component name=hero site=my-brand group=my-brand

commands.name: new-policy
commands.description: Generate a content policy and wire it into a template. Usage: /new-policy component=hero template=content-page site=my-brand

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Plain-English explanation of any AEM 6.5 concept with examples. Usage: /explain topic="editable templates"

commands.name: debug
commands.description: Diagnose AEM errors, broken XML, or misbehaving HTL. Usage: /debug [paste your error or file content]

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Show a human-readable summary of everything detected in this project — paths, naming conventions, gaps, and recommended next steps.

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Compare the detected project structure against AEM 6.5 best practices and get a prioritised list of issues with fix commands pre-filled.

commands.name: list-skills
commands.description: Browse the team library — lists all available skills, agents, and guides with the exact /use-skill command to invoke each one.

commands.name: use-skill
commands.description: Invoke a named skill, agent, or guide from the team library. Usage: /use-skill name=hero-component

aem-copilot.libraryPath.markdownDescription: Path to a shared team library folder containing `skills/`, `agents/`, and `guides/` subfolders. Accepts an absolute path or a path relative to the workspace root. Leave blank to use only the local `.aem-library/` folder.
